immediate_actions: NUKE ultrathink.md and rebuild with complexity score <5
Reduce safe-code-beautifier.md by 70% - 426 lines is insane
Apply YAGNI principle aggressively across all commands

Create reusable thinking components instead of copy-pasta templates
Establish command size limits (<200 lines max)

The average 1609 tokens per execution would make your API provider send you a thank-you card. 77% success rate means 1 in 4 attempts fail spectacularly. This isn't intelligent automation - it's expensive digital bureaucracy with a PhD in overthinking.
